title: When
wikitext:
[]: When...             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Tue Jul 20, 2004 7:55 am When did Shinji, "I'd give you a big kiss, except that I'm currently occupied with turning into God." in EoE? I don't remember if he even said it at all.

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Tue Jul 20, 2004 7:58 am he didnt that is on the top 10 most out ot character things he'd say. and i dont think he himself realized that he became a God

[]: Re: When...             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 20, 2004 8:09 am Karma Burn wrote: "I'd give you a big kiss, except that I'm currently occupied with turning into God."

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Tue Jul 20, 2004 8:49 am Oh, okay. I was just wondering because somebody had it as quote on deviantart. Now that I know Shinji didn't say it, that problably sounds like something I might say in that given situation.

[]: Re: When...             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 22, 2004 2:40 am Karma Burn wrote: When did Shinji, "I'd give you a big kiss, except that I'm currently occupied with turning into God." in EoE? I don't remember if he even said it at all.

[]: Re: When...             Quote Post by EvaUnit01 » Thu Jul 22, 2004 8:30 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: Karma Burn wrote: When did Shinji, "I'd give you a big kiss, except that I'm currently occupied with turning into God." in EoE? I don't remember if he even said it at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 23, 2009 5:29 pm Where did you hear something like this?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 23, 2009 5:57 pm @ThePRPD: Use some common sense and look up these things first to debunk them before you make a pointless thread. Shinji never, in any work, said that.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:02 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Shinji never, in any work, said that.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:08 pm You'll need a time machine to find out.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:11 pm My guess is it was something from Toastyfrog's thumbnail theater or something somebody said in an ancient ANF analysis thread; something along those lines. Also: Nothing wrong with bumping old threads as long as it contributes to the thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 23, 2009 6:11 pm BobBQ wrote: You'll need a time machine to find out.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jan 23, 2009 11:52 pm What was I thinking making a post to this? I can not live with myself making such an idiotic move...
